playbook.intent: Stale competitive picture → sharper positioning + 1 ship + kill-list updates.
playbook.scope: Solo founder runs a 90-minute monthly scan: top 5 competitors re-audited, pricing & feature deltas captured, 1 positioning tweak shipped, kill-list updated for non-differentiating roadmap items. Exit artifact is positioning-diff log + shipped landing-page edit.

success-criteria.criterion: Top 5 competitors checked: pricing + 3 newest features

stage.name: Audit
stage.intent: Re-check pricing + features of top 5 competitors.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when all 5 audited. Refuse partial — biases positioning.

stage.name: Diff
stage.intent: What changed in positioning vs our copy?

tasks.task: Note non-differentiating features in our roadmap

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 1 actionable insight per competitor. Stay if findings are vague.

stage.name: Ship

tasks.task: Edit landing-page copy with sharpest delta

stage.decision-gate: Required output: shipped copy + kill-list entry. No 'we should do this' notes only.

extra.value: [New market entry research — separate niche-evaluation, Full ICP rewrite — quarterly only]
[Existing positioning statement, Competitor list with URLs]
[Copying competitor positioning verbatim — kills differentiation, 'Adding their features to our roadmap reflexively — should trigger Kill-list update, not Add']
['Did I cut something from the roadmap, or only add?', 'Is the landing-page edit visible to a stranger, or cosmetic?']
{human: faion get-content monthly-competitor-scan --format md, agent: faion get-content monthly-competitor-scan --format context, json: faion get-content monthly-competitor-scan --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
